_comment: Z_MINT and Z_THRESHOLD are PUBLIC and canonical — published here on purpose so this repo is an authoritative source of the official mint address. Secrets (RPC key, gate signing key) are NEVER committed; they come from env. To run: copy to config.json (gitignored) or set env vars.
_mint_note: The only official $Z mint. Verify against societyz.xyz/enter and the pump.fun page. Mint and freeze authority are both revoked. Token-2022 program.
_threshold_note: Propose-tier floor in $Z (uiAmount). 1,000,000 $Z = 0.1% of the 1B supply. Low on purpose so a price move never locks members out; revisited by governance.

_env.HELIUS_RPC_URL: read from process.env.HELIUS_RPC_URL — includes your Helius API key, never commit. A public RPC (https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com) works for low volume; Helius is recommended for reliability.
_env.GATE_SIGNING_SECRET_KEY: read from process.env.GATE_SIGNING_SECRET_KEY — base58 ed25519 secret of the gate's verdict key, never commit. If unset, verdicts are returned unsigned.
_env.SECOND_RPC_URL: optional read from process.env.SECOND_RPC_URL — a second provider for fail-closed agreement checks (see honest failure modes)
